name: bug-fix-loop
description: Reproduce -> fix -> verify, looping (bounded) until the repro dies; before-merge gate receives review, security, test, and rollback evidence.
rules: sequential stages — each seat writes its declared files directly (no parallel writers, so no steward needed)

the fixer works in an isolated worktree under the room's `worktrees` contract (BASE_SHA is computed after the repro commit and carried in untracked .solo/run-state/<run_id>.json — worktree agents branch from the DEFAULT branch), and logs the fix rationale AND a revert plan in decisions/release, and a security-impact note in risks — the gate refuses to run without them

the verifier MUST test the fixer's exact commit: check out the returned commit_sha, prove `git rev-parse HEAD` equals it in tests.md, and only then run the repro + regression tests — verifying the unchanged main workspace is a contract violation the gatekeeper rejects
state-changing browser tests are manual-only; the reproducer uses console/read-only evidence and asks the human to run /browser:smoke-test when needed

seats.deliverable: Commits the deterministic reproduction to .solo/bugs.md FIRST, then records BASE_SHA (git rev-parse HEAD) in untracked .solo/run-state/<run_id>.json (it NEVER asks for or checks out a fixer commit — no fixer exists yet)

Minimal fix in an isolated worktree + rationale in decisions.md, security-impact note in risks.md, revert plan in release.md; returns the builder payload (worktree_path, branch, clean commit_sha, tests, proposal) per the room worktrees contract

Checks out the FIXER'S EXACT COMMIT (git checkout <commit_sha> from the fixer's payload — never the unchanged main workspace), records `git rev-parse HEAD` == commit_sha in tests.md as proof, then: original repro no longer reproduces; regression test added; results in tests.md

seats.agent_note: the before-merge gate is the Git/PR manager's call; it also runs the code review commands
seats.deliverable: GO/NO-GO with review, security, test, and rollback evidence attached

exit_criteria: verifier reports PASS, the original repro fails to reproduce, and /gate:before-merge returns GO on the full evidence set

loop.until: verifier reports PASS and the original repro fails to reproduce
loop.on_max_iterations: stop and run /ai:repair-cycle on the fixer's prompt before continuing

base_sha.recorded_by: the reproducer COMMITS the reproduction (.solo/bugs.md) FIRST, then computes BASE_SHA = `git rev-parse HEAD` and writes it to UNTRACKED .solo/run-state/<run_id>.json — never into a tracked file (a commit cannot contain its own SHA)
base_sha.rule: the fixer's worktree branches from the DEFAULT branch, not the parent session HEAD — the fixer first fast-forwards onto BASE_SHA (`git merge --ff-only <BASE_SHA>`, or rebases) and verifies `git merge-base --is-ancestor <BASE_SHA> HEAD` before touching code

worktrees.proposal_transport: the fixer COMMITS its payload as .solo/proposals/fixer-<run_id>.json inside its branch (clean tree; commit_sha = git rev-parse HEAD); the verifier reads the branch and payload through the shared git object store

integration.ref: the fixer's branch at the returned commit_sha

assumes_preexisting..solo/bugs.md: the bug report under investigation — filed by an earlier QA/browser session or the user; the reproducer reads it before writing its repro
assumes_preexisting..solo/architecture.md: produced by the architecture phase of an earlier room/session; read by the fixer for context
